ops.title: CI red on main: 'var clear bool' shadows builtin (revive) in newRevisingCmd
ops.description: golangci-lint fails on main since commit 5b49b6c2 ('fix(revising): ... add revising --clear'): internal/cli/commands.go:574 'redefinition of the built-in function clear (revive)'. 5b49b6c2's own CI run was cancelled by rapid successive pushes, so the red surfaced on the next push's run (29719255598). The file is under active editing by the owning session — rename the variable (e.g. clearSet) rather than suppressing the lint. Found by the fleet gitignore-migration sweep (unrelated diff).

ops.text: golangci-lint passes on main: no builtin-shadowing diagnostic at internal/cli/commands.go newRevisingCmd
